headline: Marathon Petroleum Safety Honors Prompt Fresh Look At Valuation Gap
summary: Marathon Petroleum received multiple honors at the American Fuel & Petrochemical Manufacturers (AFPM) Safety Awards. The Detroit refinery earned back to back Distinguished Safety Awards, the AFPM's highest safety recognition. Refineries in Mandan and St. Paul Park, along with six other company facilities, also received safety accolades. For investors watching NYSE:MPC, this cluster of AFPM Safety Awards highlights a company placing significant emphasis on operating discipline and safety...

headline: Bull of the Day: Marathon Petroleum (MPC)
summary: With crude oil prices elevated and no clear path to lower prices, energy stocks like Marathon Petroleum are well positioned to continue appreciating.
